effect_summary: V151 applied once to existing PostgreSQL after exact source alignment. The one-shot repository consumed one existing Rust scanner cycle into ALR-owned append-only ledger rows, recorded a duplicate event, and reconstructed restart state without changing scanner source data or extending authority.
conditions: trading_ai role is absent; P2-3 must verify or provision an approved service DB identity before service start.
P2-3 service/event consumer requires a fresh PM -> E3 -> BB -> PM gate.
No profit, proof, serving, or promotion claim is supported.
